title: centaurea affinis
intro: Centaurea affinis, also known as the yellow knapweed or centaury, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to help lower blood pressure. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal preparations. In traditional herbal medicine, Centaurea affinis is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
